title: cosmostigma cordatum
intro: Cosmostigma cordatum, also known as Cordatum, is a plant species belonging to the family Achariaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cosmostigma cordatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal remedies.
